title: Zobell Agar/Broth Medium
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"dn7vl","text":"   Tryptone 5 g   Yeast Extract 1 g   Seawater 1 L   Dry Ice 10-12 g   ","type":"atomic","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":0,"length":71}],"data":[]},{"key":"16fl2","text":" For bottom agar plates, add 15 g agar.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"5fj9n","text":"For top agar, add 4 g agar (or 4 g LMP agar)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"45m4o","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"dhuro","text":"-Heat to dissolve agar.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"avmt3","text":"-Autoclave.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"5qg6p","text":"-Cool in water bath to 41°C for top agar or to 50°C to pour bottom agar plates.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"74foe","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"e0r3g","text":"*Rohwer et al (2000) Liminol.
